meaning: n.[天]土星,土星火箭,[商]杀草丹
examples: Saturn is the second biggest planet in the solar system.
The next planet out, Uranus—after Saturn.
In the past Saab and Saturn have been free to operate as almost-separate entities, developing their own vehicles.
Saturn, the money-losing small car division, disappeared into the darkest, iciest regions of the corporate galaxy.
